description: Present-day romance: a central love story with an emotionally satisfying, optimistic ending (HEA or HFN) and the relationship as the spine of the book. Modern real-world settings, no magic (that's romantasy) and no period setting (that's historical romance). Built on the romance beat sheet — engineered proximity, the dark moment at ~75%, an earned reunion. Tuned for ~60k category to 80k+ single-title novels.
